---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
1 + 1
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

install.packages

```{r}
library(dplyr) # For data manipulation (filter, group_by, summarize)
library(stringr) # For cleaning txt data 
library(vegan)  # For diversity 
library(ggplot2)# For creating static plots
library(leaflet)    
library(tidyr) # For reshaping data (pivot_wider)
```

```{r}
bird.data <- read.csv("C:/Users/Ola/Downloads/Survey Data entry - Data entry (4).csv")
```

```{r}
unique(bird.data$Bird.species)
```


```{r}
cleaned_data <- bird.data %>%
  # Step 1: Clean the Bird.species column first.
  # This removes leading/trailing whitespace and converts everything to lowercase.
  # This is crucial for the case_when() to work correctly.
  mutate(
    Bird.species = str_to_lower(str_trim(Bird.species))
  ) %>%
  # Step 2: Now, standardize the species names using case_when().
  # Because the names are now lowercase, the matching will work as expected.
  mutate(
    Bird.species = case_when(
      # Variations of American Goldfinch
      Bird.species %in% c("american goldfish") ~ "American Goldfinch",
      # Variations of American Robin
      Bird.species %in% c("amercan robin", "robin") ~ "American Robin",
      # Variations of Belted Kingfisher
      Bird.species %in% c("belted flycatcher") ~ "Belted Kingfisher",
      # Variations of Black-capped Chickadee
      Bird.species %in% c("black-capped chickadee") ~ "Black-capped Chickadee",
      # Variations of Brown-headed Cowbird
      Bird.species %in% c("brown headed cowbird") ~ "Brown-headed Cowbird",
      # Variations of Chipping Sparrow
      Bird.species %in% c("american chipping sparrow") ~ "Chipping Sparrow",
      # Variations of Common Grackle
      Bird.species %in% c("commin grackle") ~ "Common Grackle",
      # Variations of Cooper's Hawk
      Bird.species %in% c("coopers hawk") ~ "Cooper's Hawk",
      # Variations of Eastern Phoebe
      Bird.species %in% c("eastern pheobe") ~ "Eastern Phoebe",
      # Variations of Eastern Towhee
      Bird.species %in% c("eastern towee") ~ "Eastern Towhee",
      # Variations of Eastern Wood-Pewee
      Bird.species %in% c("eastern-wood pewee", "eastern wood peewee", "wood peewee") ~ "Eastern Wood-Pewee",
      # Variations of European Starling
      Bird.species %in% c("europian starling") ~ "European Starling",
      # Variations of Gray Catbird
      Bird.species %in% c("catbird") ~ "Gray Catbird",
      # Variations of Great Blue Heron
      Bird.species %in% c("great blue herron") ~ "Great Blue Heron",
      # Variations of Great Crested Flycatcher
      Bird.species %in% c("great-crested flycatcher") ~ "Great Crested Flycatcher",
      # Variations of House Wren
      Bird.species %in% c("northern house wren") ~ "House Wren",
      # Variations of Northern Cardinal
      Bird.species %in% c("northen cardinal") ~ "Northern Cardinal",
      # Variations of Northern Flicker
      Bird.species %in% c("northen flicker") ~ "Northern Flicker",
      # Variations of Northern Mockingbird
      Bird.species %in% c("northern mochingbird") ~ "Northern Mockingbird",
      # Variations of Red-bellied Woodpecker
      Bird.species %in% c("red bellied woodpecker", "red-bellied woodpecker") ~ "Red-bellied Woodpecker",
      # Variations of Red-eyed Vireo
      Bird.species %in% c("red-eyed verio", "red eyed vireo", "red-eyed vireo") ~ "Red-eyed Vireo",
      # Variations of Red-winged Blackbird
      Bird.species %in% c("red-wing blackbird", "red-winged blackbirds", "Red-Winged Blackbird") ~ "Red-winged Blackbird",
      # Variations of Rock Pigeon
      Bird.species %in% c("pigeon", "rock dove", "rock pidgeon") ~ "Rock Pigeon",
      # Variations of Rose-breasted Grosbeak
      Bird.species %in% c("rose breasted grosbeak", "rose-breasted grossbeak, Rose-Breasted Grosbeak") ~ "Rose-breasted Grosbeak",
      # Variations of Warbling Vireo
      Bird.species %in% c("warbling vierio") ~ "Warbling Vireo",
      # Variations of White-breasted Nuthatch
      Bird.species %in% c("white-breasted nuthatch") ~ "White-breasted Nuthatch",
      # Variations of Wood Thrush
      Bird.species %in% c("wood trush") ~ "Wood Thrush",
      # Variations of Chimney Swift
      Bird.species %in% c("chimey swift") ~ "Chimney Swift",
      # For all other species that are already correct (just lowercase), convert to Title Case.
      # The 'TRUE' condition acts as a default for any value that didn't match the cases above.
      TRUE ~ str_to_title(Bird.species)
    )
  )

```

#/iiuyyfirst make everything lowercase
#then change whatever is left that needs to be changed
#data <- cleaned_data %>% mutate(Bird.species = ifelse(Bird.species == "old name", "new name", Bird.species)) %>% #do the mutate again for each species name that needs the changing

```
```{r}
cleaned_data <- cleaned_data %>% mutate(Bird.species = ifelse(Bird.species == "Rose-Breasted Grosbeak", "Rose-breasted Grosbeak", Bird.species)) %>% mutate(Bird.species = ifelse(Bird.species == "	
Eastern Wood Peewee", "	
Eastern wood-Peewee", Bird.species)) %>% mutate(Bird.species = ifelse(Bird.species == "	
Eastern-Wood Peewee", "	
Eastern wood-Peewee", Bird.species)) %>% mutate(Bird.species = ifelse(Bird.species == "	
Red-Winged Blackbird", "	
Red-winged Blackbird", Bird.species)) 
```

```{r}
cleaned_data$Bird.species[cleaned_data$Bird.species == "Red-Winged Blackbird"] <- "Red-winged Blackbird"

cleaned_data$Bird.species[cleaned_data$Bird.species == "Brown-Headed Cowbird"] <- "Brown-headed Cowbird"

cleaned_data$Bird.species[cleaned_data$Bird.species == "Eastern Wood Pewee"] <- "Eastern wood-pewee"

cleaned_data$Bird.species[cleaned_data$Bird.species == "Eastern-Wood Pewee"] <- "Eastern wood-pewee"

```

```{r}
cleaned_data <- na.omit(cleaned_data)
```


```{r}
species_summary <- data.frame(
    Bird.species = character(),
    Total.Count = integer()
  )

```

```{r}
unique.sp <- unique(cleaned_data$Bird.species)
```



```{r}
cleaned_data$Number.individuals.observed <- as.numeric(cleaned_data$Number.individuals.observed)
for (ii in 1:length(unique.sp)) {
  x <- unique.sp[ii]
  count <- sum(cleaned_data[cleaned_data$Bird.species == x,"Number.individuals.observed"])
    species_summary <- rbind(species_summary, data.frame(
      Bird.species = x,
      Total.Count = count
    ))
}

```

```{r}
  rownames(species_counts) <- NULL
  print(species_summary)
```

```{r}
write.csv(cleaned_data, file="cleaned_data.csv")
```


```{r}
sorted_species <- species_summary %>%
  arrange(desc(Total.Count)) %>%
  mutate(Bird.species = factor(Bird.species, levels = unique(Bird.species)))

```

```{r}
cleaned_data$Bird.species[cleaned_data
$Bird.species == "Eastern Wood-Pewee"] <- "Eastern wood-pewee"
```



```{r}
sorted_species$Bird.species[sorted_species
$Bird.species == "Eastern Wood-Pewee"] <- "Eastern wood-pewee"
```

```{r}
pewee_sum <- sum(sorted_species$Count[sorted_species$Bird.species == "eastern wood pewee"])

sorted_species_f <- sorted_species[sorted_species$sorted_species != "eastern wood pewee", ]

pewee_row <- data.frame(Bird.species = "eastern wood pewee", Count = pewee_sum)

sorted_species <- rbind(sorted_species_f, pewee_row)
```

```{r}
```

```{r}

```


```{r}


sorted_species <- species_summary %>%
  arrange(desc(Total.Count)) %>%
  mutate(Bird.species = factor(Bird.species, levels = unique(Bird.species)))

sorted_species$Bird.species <- as.character(sorted_species$Bird.species)
sorted_species$Bird.species <- as.factor(sorted_species$Bird.species)  

ggplot(data = sorted_species, aes(x = reorder(Bird.species, -Total.Count), y = Total.Count)) + geom_col() + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) + labs(x = "Species", y = "Total Bird Count, Descending")

```

```{r}
unique_locID <- cleaned_data %>%
  distinct(Loc_ID, Latitude, Longitude)

```


```{r}
richness_summary <- data.frame(
  Loc_ID,
  lat = numeric(),
  lon = numeric(),
  richness,
  Evenness = numeric()
)
```


```{r}
for (ii in 1:nrow(unique_locID)) {
  
  new_row <- data.frame(
    LocationID = unique_locID$Loc_ID[i],
    lat = unique_locID$Latitude[i],
    lon = unique_locID$Longitude[i],
    Richness = NA,   
    Evenness = NA 
  )
  
  richness_summary <- rbind(richness_summary, new_row)
}

<!-- head(richness_summary) -->
```

```{r}
cd1v <- subset(cleaned_data, Loc_ID == 1, select = c(Latitude, Longitude, Bird.species, Number.individuals.observed))

```

```{r}
richness <- cleaned_data %>%
  group_by(Loc_ID) %>%
  summarize(richness = n_distinct(Bird.species))
```

```{r}
com.mtrix <- xtabs(Number.individuals.observed ~ Loc_ID + Bird.species, data = cleaned_data)

```

```{r}
shannon_diversity <- diversity(com.mtrix, index = "shannon")
```

```{r}
shannon_diversity_rows <- diversity(com.mtrix, index = "shannon", MARGIN = 1)
```

```{r}
evenness <- shannon_diversity_rows
```


```{r}
sdr <- as.data.frame(shannon_diversity_rows)
```

```{r}
sdr2 <- sdr
```

```{r}
sdr2 <- tibble::rownames_to_column(sdr2, "Loc_ID") 
```

```{r}
coords <- cleaned_data %>%
  select(Loc_ID, lat = Latitude, lon = Longitude) %>%
  distinct()
```

```{r}
coords$Loc_ID <- as.character(coords$Loc_ID)
richness$Loc_ID <- as.character(richness$Loc_ID)
sdr2$Loc_ID <- as.character(sdr2$Loc_ID)
```


```{r}
richness_summary <- coords %>%
  left_join(richness, by = "Loc_ID") %>%
  left_join(sdr2, by = "Loc_ID") %>%
  select(Loc_ID, lat, lon, richness, evenness) 
```
